title: Rabbit School: Guardians of the Golden Egg
original_title: Die Häschenschule – Jagd nach dem Goldenen Ei
overview: Rabbit Max, a juvenile shoplifter, gets trapped in an old-fashioned school. With rabbit girl Emmy, he acquires Easter Rabbits' secret skills, battles a sneaky fox family and learns about friendship.
